examples: The ancient fecal material, or coprolite, was littered with seared prickly pear seeds and flecked with small bones from fish, birds, and rodents.
Lee Weavers, 60, from Coprolite Street, Ipswich, denies possessing an offensive weapon and assault.
Earlier tests had shown that the coprolite was deposited around the time of the Cowboy Wash catastrophe and that it contained very little plant material.
